FOLDER.NAME: stg_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: ETL Staging Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

FOLDER.NAME: ap_project
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Accounts Payable Projects Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Atif Usman

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to copy files from one location to another. After copying it will archive source files and create .list file if more than 1 file is copied. Read the command documentation for more information.
TASK.NAME: cmd_copy_file

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Mapping to load data into flat file from taregt staging table
MAPPING.NAME: m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: SQ transformation to fetch data from staging table T_AP_CITIBANK_VCA
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: sq_T_AP_CITIBANK_VCA

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression transformation to set valid_to and valid_from dates in required format as well as set the output file name embdded with timestamp.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_SET_COLUMNS

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: SQ transformation to fetch data from staging table T_AP_CITIBANK_VCA
INSTANCE.NAME: sq_T_AP_CITIBANK_VCA

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Expression transformation to set valid_to and valid_from dates in required format as well as set the output file name embdded with timestamp.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_SET_COLUMNS

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION SUCCESS COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION FAILURE COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end_fail

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to initiate ETL load process. FOR USE AS A PRE-SESSION COMMAND.
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_start

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: Workflow to load data from staging table to flat file
WORKFLOW.NAME: wf_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: Session to load data from staging table to target file
SESSION.NAME: s_m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Session to load data from staging table to target file
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: s_m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Command task to copy from target folder to outbound folder.
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: cmd_copy_file

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_AP_FF_CITIBANK_VCA.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: ap_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Accounts Payable Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Atif Usman
